what_changed: Sorted same-shard disk range reads by byte offset during batched materialization while preserving caller payload order.
why: Document chunk selections can arrive in semantic order rather than physical shard order; sorting same-file reads reduces seek churn for Disk and Unity Catalog Volume cache loading without changing API results.
